nasb.text: For the Son of Man is to go just as it is written of Him; but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would have been good for that man if he had not been born.”

esv.text: For the Son of Man goes as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would have been better for that man if he had not been born.”

cnv.text: 正如經上指著人子所說的，他固然要離世，但出賣人子的那人有禍了！他沒有生下來還好。”

ccb.text: 人子一定会受害，正如圣经的记载，但出卖人子的人有祸了，他还不如不生在这世上！”

csbs.text: 人子确实要离去，正如经上指着他所写的，但是出卖人子的那个人有祸了。对他来说，没有出生倒好。”
